3253870.name: DCS: AH-64D Outpost Campaign by Stone Sky
3253870.description:
Explore the chronicles of the Syrian War in the OUTPOST campaign series. In the second instalment, you'll dive into the events of 2012-2017, piloting the AH-64 Apache helicopter. Take on the role of U.S. pilots navigating through some of the most challenging phases of this conflict. 

In the complex geopolitical landscape, Syria serves as a key outpost for both Russia and the United States. Beyond being a central battleground against terrorism, Syria has become a stage for the rivalry between global powers, each pursuing their strategic interests and shaping international relations.

The campaign features 15 meticulously crafted missions based on real events. You will participate in deployments at Incirlik Air Base and King Hussein Air Base in Jordan, as well as at strategic locations in northern Syria, such as the well-known cement plant and the formidable Tal Saman base. Engage in battles for the Tishrin Dam and the city of Tishrin, and take part in the intense fights for Manbij, Tabqa, and the legendary Raqqa. These missions will showcase the full might of CJTF–OIR joint combat operations.

Stone Sky's attention to detail and careful mission design will exceed your expectations. The OUTPOST campaign series will appeal to seasoned pilots with its historical accuracy and diverse missions, while oﬀering newcomers the adaptation and support needed throughout the campaign.

Key Features:

  • The possibility of cooperative playing the game in the role of PLT and CPG

  • 15 missions based on real events

  • JTAC and FAC operations, Medevac missions, and special assignments

  • Interaction with U.S. Air Force UAVs, A-10, F/A-18, and B-1 Lancer

  • Over 2,500 radio dialogues

  • More than 200 pages of documentation and kneeboard

Voiceover: English

Briefings and subtitles: English

All required products

  • DCS: AH-64D by Eagle Dynamics

  • DCS Syria Map
3253870.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 俄语, 捷克语, 法语, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
